cases.title: Command "pytest -q" failed 2 times in one iteration without root-cause analysis
cases.trigger_condition: The same command failed repeatedly within a single iteration with no documented root cause.

human_flow.action: must run at least one verification command
checks evidence before marking task complete

cases.expected_behavior: After two consecutive failures of the same command, the executor must summarize root cause before continuing.
regression_assertions: if changed_files is non-empty then commands_run must be non-empty
if commands_run is empty then unable_to_verify_reason must be set
supervisor must not accept completed without verification_evidence
reproduction_steps: configure executor to return changed_files without commands_run
